Title: NSG has no inbound rules restricting SSH access
Detail: Network Security Group allows SSH (port 22) from any source address
Remediation: Restrict SSH access to specific IP ranges or use Azure Bastion. See https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/virtual-network/network-security-groups-overview

Title: Key Vault soft delete is disabled
Detail: Key Vault does not have soft delete enabled, risking permanent data loss
Remediation: Enable soft delete on the Key Vault via portal or CLI

Title: Storage account uses HTTPS-only transport
Detail: Storage account correctly enforces HTTPS-only connections

Title: Virtual machine does not use managed disks
Detail: VM uses unmanaged disks which lack built-in redundancy and simplified management
Remediation: Migrate to managed disks using the Azure portal or PowerShell Convert-AzVMManagedDisk

Title: Azure SQL Database TDE is enabled
Detail: Transparent Data Encryption is enabled on the SQL Database

Title: AKS cluster does not use Azure CNI networking
Detail: Cluster uses kubenet instead of Azure CNI, limiting network policy support
Remediation: Recreate cluster with Azure CNI or migrate using overlay networking

Title: Diagnostic settings not configured for App Service
Detail: App Service does not have diagnostic settings configured for Log Analytics
Remediation: Configure diagnostic settings to send logs to a Log Analytics workspace

Title: Subscription has Owner role assigned to external guest user
Detail: Guest user external-vendor@outlook.com has Owner role on subscription
Remediation: Remove Owner from guest accounts; use scoped Contributor or custom roles instead

Title: No Azure Policy assigned at management group scope
Detail: Management group 'mg-platform' has zero policy assignments, leaving governance gaps
Remediation: Assign ALZ default policy set at the management group level

Title: Tag policy inheritance is correctly configured
Detail: Tag inheritance policy is assigned and enforced across subscriptions

Title: Public IP addresses found without DDoS protection
Detail: 3 public IP addresses are not protected by Azure DDoS Protection Standard
Remediation: Enable DDoS Protection Standard on the virtual network or use DDoS IP protection

Title: Virtual machine scale set uses latest OS image
Detail: VMSS is using the latest patched Ubuntu 22.04 LTS image

Title: Storage account allows public blob access
Detail: Storage account has AllowBlobPublicAccess set to true
Remediation: Set AllowBlobPublicAccess to false on the storage account

Title: Azure Cache for Redis has no geo-replication configured
Detail: Redis cache is deployed in a single region without geo-replication for DR
Remediation: Configure active or passive geo-replication for cross-region failover

Title: App Service plan has only 1 instance
Detail: Production App Service plan has a single instance, creating a single point of failure
Remediation: Scale out to at least 2 instances and enable zone redundancy

Title: Load balancer health probe is correctly configured
Detail: Standard Load Balancer has custom health probe on /health endpoint

Title: Cosmos DB account does not have multi-region writes enabled
Detail: Cosmos DB account is configured with single-region writes, limiting write availability during regional outages
Remediation: Enable multi-region writes in the Cosmos DB account replication settings

Title: Managed identity used for Key Vault access
Detail: Application uses managed identity instead of service principal secrets for Key Vault access
